title: Review Paperclip dev-department plugin code and write findings report
job:
You are the Code Reviewer for the Paperclip Development team. Review the Development Department plugin code that was just built in plugins/dev-department/.

Read ALL of these files:
- plugins/dev-department/paperclip-plugin.json
- plugins/dev-department/package.json
- plugins/dev-department/tsconfig.json
- plugins/dev-department/src/worker/types.ts
- plugins/dev-department/src/worker/state.ts
- plugins/dev-department/src/worker/index.ts
- plugins/dev-department/src/ui/index.tsx
- plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/DepartmentView.tsx
- plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/ProjectHeader.tsx
- plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/PhaseList.tsx
- plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/PhaseDetail.tsx
- plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/ConversationRefs.tsx

REVIEW CHECKLIST:
1. Plugin manifest: valid structure, correct apiVersion, UI slots have entityTypes
2. TypeScript: strict types, no any, proper interfaces, all status enums present
3. React components: clean structure, proper state management, no memory leaks
4. State management: CRUD operations complete, data keyed properly
5. Data model: all entities from PRD present, placeholder entities exist as interfaces
6. Phase status and freeze state: independently settable, not coupled
7. Phase ordering: uses sortOrder field correctly
8. Security: no exposed secrets, proper input handling
9. Extensibility: clean connection points for Phase 2 dispatch/queue
10. Missing features: anything from the PRD that wasnt implemented

Write your review to logs/code-review-phase1.md with:
- APPROVE / REJECT / REQUEST CHANGES
- Findings with severity (critical/error/warning/info)
- Specific file:line references
- Phase 2 compatibility assessment
- Recommended fixes

Commit the review file.
